title: Spot the difference
wikitext:
[]: Spot the difference Post by PurpleandRed » Fri Aug 07, 2015 12:35 pm

[]: Post by Arcadia's legacy » Fri Aug 07, 2015 12:44 pm I......don't get it

[]: Post by ChaddyManPrime » Fri Aug 07, 2015 12:47 pm Asuka's the difference guys, he/she's a Asuka fan.

[]: Post by Iuvenal » Fri Aug 07, 2015 12:52 pm It's true, Asuka has a very different demeanor during that sync test than the other two. There's nothing wrong with pointing that out in the chit-chat subforum, where we horse around all day! Congrats on your first post, forums user PurpleAndRed.

[]: Post by PurpleandRed » Fri Aug 07, 2015 12:59 pm Iuvenal wrote:

[]: Post by Iuvenal » Fri Aug 07, 2015 1:03 pm It's a leaked screenshot of Evangelion New Theatrical Release 3.0 + 1.0 + 0.20: You Can (Not) BlazeIt

[]: Post by ChaddyManPrime » Fri Aug 07, 2015 1:17 pm ^ Oh if we had rep on this site you would have certainly earned it.

[]: Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Aug 07, 2015 1:17 pm I'm probably taking this more seriously than I should, but the difference might be that for Rei and Shinji, their displays list R. Ayanami and S. Ikari, respectively. Asuka's lists S. Asuka Langley.

[]: Post by IronEvangelion » Fri Aug 07, 2015 1:24 pm Wait, where are Asuka's neural connectors in that picture?

[]: Post by Arcadia's legacy » Fri Aug 07, 2015 1:25 pm The're there. just a little obscured

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Aug 07, 2015 2:42 pm Topic. Answer?

[]: Post by Bagheera » Fri Aug 07, 2015 3:14 pm Asked and answered, I think. Not sure there's anything left to do here. The rendering of Asuka's name is weird, though. Why the hell would Khara do that?

[]: Post by ChaddyManPrime » Fri Aug 07, 2015 3:18 pm Wasn't it always last name first?

[]: Post by Bagheera » Fri Aug 07, 2015 3:38 pm ChaddyManPrime wrote: Wasn't it always last name first?

[]: Post by ChaddyManPrime » Fri Aug 07, 2015 4:40 pm Well it's not Asuka, it's Shikinami, Shikinami and Asuka are two different characters.

[]: Post by Arcadia's legacy » Fri Aug 07, 2015 4:42 pm Shikinami and Sohryu are two different characters

[]: Post by Bagheera » Fri Aug 07, 2015 4:48 pm ChaddyManPrime wrote: Well it's not Asuka, it's Shikinami, Shikinami and Asuka are two different characters.

[]: Post by ChaddyManPrime » Fri Aug 07, 2015 4:50 pm ^ Her middle name appears to be Asuka though Good Sir.

[]: Post by Bagheera » Fri Aug 07, 2015 4:55 pm ChaddyManPrime wrote: ^ Her middle name appears to be Asuka though Good Sir.
summary:
